name: Valley of the Eagles Golf Club
about: Valley of the Eagles Golf Club is a Nicklaus Design daily-fee course in Northern Ohio, featuring a championship golf course that meanders through the scenic Black River Valley. The venue also offers state-of-the-art indoor golf simulators by Full Swing Golf, allowing for year-round play. It includes extensive clubhouse facilities and the Black River Tavern, serving lunch, dinner, and Sunday brunch. The property is equipped for hosting various events, including tournaments, weddings, and special occasions for groups ranging from 20 to 300 people.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Nicklaus Design course offering a challenging and scenic experience
State-of-the-art Full Swing Golf simulators for year-round play
Extensive event hosting capabilities with catering and banquet facilities
On-site dining at Black River Tavern available to golfers and the public

food_and_drink.notes: The Black River Tavern serves lunch, dinner, and Sunday brunch to both golfers and non-golfers.
The Black River Tavern serves drinks and is available for business lunches, after-work drinks, and family dinners.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether club rentals are available, but it is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned. The on-site Black River Tavern serves lunch, dinner, and Sunday brunch.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not provide an estimated time for a full 18-hole simulator round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is suitable for families but specific kid-friendly amenities or activities are not detailed on the website.
